unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Computer
title: Using Maps Online
drDigitalIntro: Online maps let you find locations, get directions, check traffic, and explore new areas. You can search for a business name, address, or type of place ('coffee shop near me'). Maps can give you directions by car, walking, cycling, or public transit. You can also switch between map view and satellite view to see real aerial photos. Maps are one of the most useful things you can do on a computer!

playgroundTask.goal: You looked up directions using an online map

steps.say: Navigate to weather.com to start — we'll check location services.
A cookie banner appeared — click Decline to keep your privacy.
Now navigate to google.com to search for directions.

drDigitalSuccess: You used an online map! Search for any place or address to get directions and information.
drDigitalHint: Navigate to a search engine, then type your destination in the search bar.
